bullets: Pray for the dozens of imprisoned house church believers in China, that God would sustain their faith, protect their families, and move authorities toward justice and release.
Lift up Christian ethnic minority communities in Myanmar who have lost strategic border regions, asking God to protect displaced families and bring an end to military violence against them.
Ask God to shield Christians in Pakistan, especially underage girls at risk of abduction and forced conversion, and to give families courage to seek justice without fear.
Pray for Fulani Christians in Nigeria's Middle Belt, that God would protect leaders facing death threats and bring peace between communities caught in ethnic and militia violence.
Pray for the hundreds of thousands of soldiers killed in Ukraine and their grieving families, and for civilians enduring relentless bombardment and the destruction of vital humanitarian supplies.
Lift up the tens of thousands of civilians in southern Lebanon forced to flee their homes—many for a second time—amid intense airstrikes, and ask God to protect every displaced family.
Pray for Palestinians in Gaza mourning loved ones during Eid al-Adha, living in displacement camps without food or electricity, and for all civilians caught in ongoing strikes.
Ask God to protect civilians in Iran living near active conflict zones as military strikes continue, and to grant wisdom to all leaders pursuing or resisting diplomacy in the region.
Lift up foreign nationals in South Africa—especially those who have fled fearing xenophobic violence—and ask God to bring calm, safety, and justice for all people regardless of nationality.
Pray for communities in Sudan's Darfur region targeted by drone strikes, asking God to shield civilians from violence and bring an end to the brutal conflict trapping whole populations.

Ask God to intervene in eastern Congo, where an Ebola outbreak is spreading amid armed conflict, mass displacement, and severe hunger, and to strengthen health workers laboring under impossible conditions.
Pray for migrants in the United States who have experienced abuse or lack of medical care while detained, and for humane and dignified treatment of all people in custody.
Pray for the two people still missing in Laos after a cave flood and landslide, and for rescue teams pressing through dangerous, narrow passages to find them.
Ask God for protection over communities in Japan as a powerful tropical cyclone moves toward coastal areas, and for safety for all who may be in its path.
Lift up vulnerable residents across France and Western Europe enduring an unusual and dangerous May heatwave, especially the elderly and those without access to cooling.
Pray for the people of Chile who felt strong shaking from a major earthquake, asking God for calm, safety, and that no hidden damage or injuries would go unaddressed.
Ask God to watch over communities in Tonga, New Zealand, Papua New Guinea, and Japan affected by multiple offshore earthquakes, guarding against harm from any aftershocks or unexpected impact.
